experiments.name: Database High Latency
experiments.description: Injects 2 000 ms delay on every request to simulate a slow database. The circuit breaker on DB calls should open after 5 consecutive slow responses and return 503 to clients.
experiments.hypothesis: Under sustained DB latency the circuit breaker opens within 5 requests and the API returns 503 within the timeout window instead of hanging.
experiments.expectedBehavior: API responds with 503 after circuit opens; recovers automatically after 30 s

experiments.name: Database Connection Failure
experiments.description: Simulates a Prisma P1001 error (database unreachable) on 100% of DB operations. Tests that retryUtils exhaust retries and the circuit breaker opens.
experiments.hypothesis: DB errors trigger retry logic (3 attempts with backoff), then the circuit opens and subsequent requests fail-fast.
experiments.expectedBehavior: Requests return 503 within 7 s (3 retries × 1-2 s backoff); circuit opens; recovery after 30 s

experiments.name: Stellar RPC Timeout
experiments.description: Wraps all Stellar RPC calls with a 3 000 ms hard timeout. Tests that transaction submission returns a TIMEOUT status rather than hanging for 60 s.
experiments.hypothesis: Transaction broadcast times out gracefully within 3 s and returns 504 to the client.
experiments.expectedBehavior: POST /broadcast returns 504 Gateway Timeout within 3 s instead of polling for 60 s

experiments.name: Stellar RPC 503 Errors
experiments.description: Injects STELLAR_RPC_ERROR on 100% of Stellar RPC calls. Validates the circuit breaker on the Stellar service opens and stops hammering the RPC endpoint.
experiments.hypothesis: Repeated RPC errors open the Stellar circuit breaker; broadcast endpoint returns 503 fail-fast after the threshold.
experiments.expectedBehavior: Circuit opens after 5 failures; subsequent requests return 503 in <1 ms

experiments.name: Partial API Error Rate (30%)
experiments.description: Injects HTTP 500 errors on 30% of all escrow read requests to simulate intermittent upstream failures.
experiments.hypothesis: Clients observe a ~30% error rate; the circuit breaker does NOT open (below threshold); healthy requests still succeed.
experiments.expectedBehavior: ~30% of requests fail with 500; circuit stays CLOSED; error rate visible in Prometheus

experiments.name: High Latency on Escrow Reads
experiments.description: Adds 1 000–1 500 ms latency to all GET /escrows requests. Validates that timeout middleware and Prometheus SLO alerts trigger.
experiments.hypothesis: P99 latency exceeds the 1 000 ms SLO; Grafana alert fires; clients receive responses (not timeouts) because no hard timeout is enforced at this level.
experiments.expectedBehavior: All GET /escrows respond with 200 but P99 > 1 000 ms; Prometheus histogram reflects latency spike
